channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Coyote pup recovers after cactus calamity
item.description: A coyote pup is recovering after being found covered in hundreds of painful cactus spines, according to an Arizona wildlife organization.

item.title: Trump takes first flight on Air Force One donated by Qatar
item.description: President Trump is flying for the first time on the new Air Force One 747, a gift from the Qatari royal family.

item.title: WATCH: Countdown to Nashville's Star-Spangled Bash
item.description: Deana Ivey, president and CEO of the Nashville Convention & Visitors Corp, previews the July 4 celebration hosted by Ryan Seacrest.

item.title: How much interest can a $55,000 CD account earn if opened now?
item.description: Interest earnings on a CD account of this size will be substantial. Here's what savers need to know right now.
